track_starshine_mod.comment: Classic Purple Motion atmospheric MOD. Sets the standard for PC chiptune in the early 90s.

track_unreal_xm.comment: Skaven's iconic PC demo soundtrack. Pioneered layered sample-based composition in the demoscene.

track_second_reality_it.comment: Future Crew's signature IT module. The reference for every PC demo compo since 1993.

track_panic_s3m.comment: Future Crew's S3M for the Panic demo. Heavy kick patterns, quick arps.

track_state_of_art_mod.comment: Spaceballs' State of the Art backing track. The Amiga vector aesthetic distilled to 4 channels.

track_werkzeug_xm.comment: Farbrausch's Werkzeug demo track. Procedural synth tones packed into a few hundred bytes of code.
